rulings.Case Title: MARIA A. NAVARRO et al VS. ADVOCATE MINES LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder To Specially-Appearing Deft Special Electric Company'S Mo To Transfer Venue
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, June 2, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendants Kentile Floors, Inc., The Pep Boys Manny Moe & Jack of California, Familian Corporation, and Keenan Properties, Inc.¿s joinders to Special Electric Company¿s motion for change in venue are denied. Defendants have not shown that venue is improper under CCP § 397(a) because they have not shown that all defendants reside outside San Francisco County. Nor have defendants demonstrated that McKesson Corporation is a ¿sham defendant.¿ Defendants have not shown that the convenience of witnesses and the ends of justice would be promoted by a change in venue under CCP § 397(c) because they have failed to provide a declaration setting forth the names of the witnesses, the nature of the testimony expected from each witness, and the reasons why the attendance of each witness would be inconvenient. =(220/HEK)
